programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Rescue from Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways must try to readjust to life in civilization after they are rescued from the island

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Pit is heading for disappointment from his TV hero after he decides to aid him versus Mother Brain

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.desc: Hong 115

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Bullwinkle 531
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 531

programme.title: Bullwinkle 110
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 110

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: The Gravest Military Mistakes In History- Tin Soldiers
programme.desc: 20th Century beliefs that a new military technology would bring about cleaner wars and reduce casualties are confounded in this look at modern warfare from the Battle of the Somme to the Gulf War

programme.title: Incredible Home Movies From WW2
programme.desc: How WW2 was documented by home movie makers This episode looks at how women delt with the war and how the responsibilty and credibility of women grew as the war went on

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Knight 317
programme.desc: Knight 317

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan Micki and Jack track down an antique pocket watch that allows its owner to freeze time

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ becomes involved in the dizzy antics of a couple of inexperienced female detectives Lorrie Mahaffey and Rebecca Reynolds tracking a low-down Lothario who romances elderly women to steal their fortunes

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogans gang steals Klinks code book from his safe photographs the contents and returns it to its proper place But theres a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film

programme.title: Mchale 236
programme.desc: Mchale 236

programme.title: Mchale 316
programme.desc: Mchale 316

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampas vanity gets the best of him when he refuses to acknowledge that he needs eyeglasses to pass the vision test for his new California drivers license

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: To keep a priceless diamond out of KAOSs hands a jeweler sells it to 86 for an engagement ring for 99

programme.title: Smart 426
programme.desc: Smart 426

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Womanizing Alvin McNair hits on three women but doesnt know theyre together Merrills godson Dave Stanton brings his wife Laura on a belated honeymoon Brothers Harold and Joe Nash plot to fake a back injury and sue the cruise line

programme.title: WKRP 111
programme.desc: WKRP 111

programme.title: WKRP 120
programme.desc: WKRP 120

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman wants his friendship with Margaret to move to the next level so Wood Ava Harlan and Merlene plan a dinner party to facilitate this

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: John Madden is sought to emcee an annual sports banquet while Wood comes to regret asking Herman to film a documentary on the Newton family life for the Newtons unborn baby to see

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A diamond theft on a cruise ship owned by Jonathan leads the Harts to join the cruise ship to catch the thief

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael balks when Mr Vanderkellen demands he sign a prenuptial agreement feeling it indicates a lack of trust on Stephanies part Meanwhile Dick breaks an irreplaceable music box given to the Vanderkellens by Winston Churchill

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is saddled with a perky co-host he doesnt want; Larry Darryl and Darryl name their pet pig after Stephanie

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A distortion in time produces two separate moons with two separate Alphas from different eras

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Daan and demands to know where his men are They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollins sent to investigate the case of a beautiful Latin American spy whos suddenly started acting suspiciously the IM force must find out if shes still on the right side - or if shes losing her sanity

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive S04E04
programme.desc: The Fugitive S04E04

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and long time family friend suddenly sets out to ruin the Barkleys He has intense hatred of Jarrod who he suspects is having an affair with his young wife

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Smitty encounter settlers headed to Wyoming who lost their guide On the way to Fort Laramie a group of rustlers steal their cattle and a boys brother is killed The two head to a nearby to try to recover the stolen cattle

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.desc: News off-beat stories and analysis of German and international affairs Dive deeper with our features from Europe and beyond Watch our 247 TV stream

programme.title: DW ENGLISH
programme.desc: News off-beat stories and analysis of German and international affairs Dive deeper with our features from Europe and beyond Watch our 247 TV stream

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Snapshot

programme.title: Teknoamn 29
programme.desc: Teknoamn 29

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to find the location of MADs school for agents

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure
